title: Software Developer
description:
SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
POSITION OVERVIEW:
The software developer role at Winthrop Capital Management (WCM) is designed to provide high potential candidates with a challenging, meaningful and supportive opportunity to experience software development in the financial world. The primary focus of the position will be helping with WOMBAT™, a proprietary wealth management application that provides a comprehensive solution to investment issues. The position requires a disciplined, organized, and engaged individual who can remain adaptable in an evolving environment. The ideal candidate has the ability to contribute in a positive manner to our culture by providing and receiving direct feedback, possessing the discipline to hold oneself accountable, and the desire to continually learn.
RESPONSIBILITIES:
Deliver reliable and high-quality code to meet requirements of the business
Assist in the maintenance and development of WOMBAT™ software
Communicate complex technical concepts clearly and concisely to non-technical counterparts
Create new modules within WOMBAT™
Create and maintain supporting background functions
Design reports to aid in the investment process
SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:
3+ years’ experience developing in C#, .NET frameworks, and SQL
A strong understanding of OOP, SOLID, CI/CD principles
Must have strong problem-solving skills
Experience working with Agile practices
Strong organizational skills
Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
COMPANY DESCRIPTION
Winthrop Capital Management was founded in 2007. We implement value-oriented investment strategies in both equity and fixed income portfolios and serve both institutional and individual investors. Our goal is to provide outstanding long-term investment performance results consistent with the risk tolerance and investment constraints of each client. We seek to provide the highest level of service to our clients to help them achieve their investment objectives.
WCM MISSION
Our goal is to help our clients achieve successful financial outcomes in relation to their specific Investment Management objectives. To accomplish this, we focus on long-term goals and create solutions that will realistically help clients achieve those goals with minimum risk.
